summary: Comprehensive testing of Digital Business Card enhancement features - Public landing page, Review system, Referral system. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features working after fix to settings route.
critical_code_review_comments: review-approvals.tsx was missing from settings/_layout.tsx - FIXED by testing agent
QR code on digital card correctly points to /p/{userId} (public landing page) - verified in code line 209
seed_data_creation: Test reviews and referrals created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Digital business card features fully tested. Public landing page at /p/{userId} shows user profile, social links, customer reviews, and has Leave a Review + Refer a Friend modals. Review Approvals page at /settings/review-approvals allows approve/reject workflow. QR code on digital card points to public landing page URL.

features_tested.public_landing_page_loads: PASS - /p/{userId} shows user profile, bio, social links, reviews
features_tested.leave_a_review_modal: PASS - Opens with name, rating stars, review text, phone, photo upload fields
features_tested.refer_a_friend_modal: PASS - Opens with referrer info and friend info fields
features_tested.referral_submission_api: PASS - POST /api/p/refer/{userId} creates referral and contact
features_tested.review_approvals_page: PASS - /settings/review-approvals shows pending reviews with approve/reject
features_tested.approved_reviews_display: PASS - Approved reviews with 4+ rating appear in testimonials
features_tested.qr_code_url: PASS - Points to /p/{userId} (public landing page) - verified in code
features_tested.digital_card_page: PASS - /card/{userId} shows profile, contact info, social links, QR code section
features_tested.social_links_display: PASS - Facebook link visible on landing page
features_tested.customer_reviews_display: PASS - Customer reviews section shows approved testimonials

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: review-approvals.tsx was created but not added to settings/_layout.tsx Stack.Screen
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Page now loads correctly and shows pending reviews with approve/reject functionality
